current_life_events: School's summer break is approaching, but he's still dealing with bullying, and his parents are pushing him to take summer classes to get ahead, while also expecting him to get a part-time job to save up for college, which is causing him to worry about his body image as he feels pressure to fit in with his peers.
mental_state: Feeling overwhelmed by the pressure to conform to societal standards and anxious about the upcoming life transitions.
why_bringing_these_up_now: The pressure to take summer classes, get a part-time job, and save up for college, combined with the ongoing bullying, is triggering his anxiety and concerns about his body image, financial future, and ability to cope with life transitions.
